title: schedonorus pilosus
intro: Schedonorus pilosus, also known as Wood Meadow Grass or Velvet Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schedonorus pilosus include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Schedonorus pilosus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
